tluaStringFormat.tlua(2,21): error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'string' is not assignable to parameter of type 'number'.
tluaStringFormat.tlua(3,1): error TLUA2554: Expected 2 arguments, but got 3.
tluaStringFormat.tlua(4,1): error TLUA2554: Expected 3 arguments, but got 2.
tluaStringFormat.tlua(18,21): error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'boolean' is not assignable to parameter of type 'string | number'.
tluaStringFormat.tlua(28,21): error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'string' is not assignable to parameter of type 'number'.
tluaStringFormat.tlua(33,21): error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'string' is not assignable to parameter of type 'number'.
tluaStringFormat.tlua(34,1): error TLUA2554: Expected 2 arguments, but got 3.


==== tluaStringFormat.tlua (7 errors) ====
    string.format("%d/%s", 1, "x");
    string.format("%d", "notnum");
                        ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'string' is not assignable to parameter of type 'number'.
    string.format("%s", "x", "extra");
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2554: Expected 2 arguments, but got 3.
    string.format("%s %s", "only one");
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2554: Expected 3 arguments, but got 2.
    
    function formatVarargTail(...: any): string
      return string.format("%s %s", ...);
    end
    
    string.format("%-08.3f is %q", 1.5, "s");
    string.format("100%% done");
    
    // %s takes anything: LuaJIT applies tostring (and __tostring) to the value.
    string.format("%s", 42);
    string.format("%s", {});
    // %q quotes a string; a number coerces, other values error at runtime.
    string.format("%q", 42);
    string.format("%q", true);
                        ~~~~
!!! error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'boolean' is not assignable to parameter of type 'string | number'.
    string.format("%z", {});
    string.format("%*", {});
    string.format("trailing %");
    
    local dynamicFormat: string = "%d";
    string.format(dynamicFormat, "unchecked", "extra");
    
    local methodFormat: "%d" = "%d";
    local methodResult = methodFormat.format(2);
    methodFormat.format("notnum");
                        ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'string' is not assignable to parameter of type 'number'.
    
    // The colon form prepends the receiver to the effective arguments; the
    // specifier check must still line up with the written arguments.
    local colonResult = methodFormat:format(2);
    methodFormat:format("notnum");
                        ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'string' is not assignable to parameter of type 'number'.
    methodFormat:format(2, "extra");
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2554: Expected 2 arguments, but got 3.
    
    local stringAlias = string;
    stringAlias.format("%d", "aliased", "extra");
    
    function shadowedString(): void
      local string = {
        format = function(format: string, ...: any): string return format; end,
      };
      string.format("%d", "shadowed", "extra");
    end
